offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, matching invoices to purchase orders causes cash flow gaps. We streamline manual invoice tracking instead of manual data entry and reconciliation.
problem: Matching invoices to purchase orders causes cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among sellers
try_it: Let users try data extraction and matching on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Make a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common invoice formats as templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing invoice data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
